violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Prep table bottom found at 43-46F. *Unit has fan blowing directly into vents to help ventilation until ordered parts come in. Directed to ice and/or move items in bottom of unit to maintain at 41F or less.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Multiple blue buckets in walk in cooler not date marked (i.e. chicken noodle and potato bacon). -Plastic zip bags of cooked meats on top shelf in walk in cooler are not date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Container of roasted pork dated 10/8.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Metal lining back prep table has rough edges and missing screws along right edge.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cardboard being used as shelf/cover at top of old cold make table across from ice machine.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. -Single use portion cup left in malt powder as a scoop.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Gaskets at bottom of pizza make table are broken/damaged.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Ice cream blender is rinsed with clear water throughout the day and fully cleaned only at the end of the day.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Nacho cheese dispenser had heavy build up of dried food debris at nozzle. *Cleaned while on-site.--Frost build up at interior of right side upright freezer.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Hand sink currently has a slow flow faucet that is difficult to turn off completely.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Exposed wood around the West side openings to the kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/mold debris at walk in cooler fans and shelves.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Worn/sagging ceiling in walk in freezer.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Personal food items stored at top shelf in walk in cooler. -Deer head in black trash bag stored at floor of walk in freezer.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
